message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.3.2

Cuts a user-facing release for the two connector fixes that landed in
franken-agent-detection rev 88756ba9 (already pinned in cass).

Fixes:

  * cass#187 — Copilot CLI Chronicle session events
    (~/.copilot/session-state/<uuid>/events.jsonl) now parse correctly.
    The Chronicle format nests message payloads under `data.content` /
    `data.role`; the previous parser only looked at top-level fields and
    silently produced zero conversations for every Chronicle session. Now
    user.message and assistant.message events are extracted from both
    top-level and nested `data` / `payload` envelopes. Session id, cwd,
    role and timestamp extraction are all envelope-aware. Regression
    coverage in tests/connector_copilot_cli.rs.

  * cass#188 — OpenCode connector diagnostics and discovery on macOS.
    The opencode probe list now includes `.local/share/opencode/opencode.db`
    directly (ahead of the sibling config dir), and detect_roots no longer
    lexicographically sorts root_paths. Before this, `cass diag` showed
    `~/.config/opencode` (the config dir) as the opencode search path
    because it sorted before `~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db`, even
    though the latter is where sessions actually live. Regression of
    #84/#146/#174; fixed upstream in franken-agent-detection 88756ba9.

No schema or public API changes.

Closes #187
Closes #188

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.3.2"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
